---
name: Feature Proposal
about: Propose a new feature, command, adapter, or capability
title: "[Proposal] "
labels: proposal
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

One-sentence summary of the proposal.

---

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Why is this needed? Describe the use case in detail.

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature in enough detail that someone could implement it.

**Checklist for a strong proposal:**
- [ ] What is the exact CLI command or behavior change?
- [ ] What are the inputs and outputs?
- [ ] How does it interact with existing features?
- [ ] Does it affect the spec documents (SKILL_SPEC, AGENT_SPEC, ADAPTER_SPEC)?

---

| Alternative | Why not chosen |
|---|---|
| <!-- alternative 1 --> | <!-- reason --> |
| <!-- alternative 2 --> | <!-- reason --> |

---

## Impact Assessment

| Area | Impact |
|---|---|
| **CLI** | <!-- new command? new flag? --> |
| **Adapters** | <!-- affects all adapters or specific ones? --> |
| **Core** | <!-- new types? new validation? --> |
| **Templates** | <!-- new template format? --> |
| **Specs** | <!-- changes to SKILL_SPEC / AGENT_SPEC / ADAPTER_SPEC? --> |
| **Backward compatibility** | <!-- breaking or non-breaking? --> |

---

## Implementation Plan (optional)

If you have a rough idea of how this would be implemented, share it here:

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing proposals before opening this one
- [ ] I have described the motivation and use case
- [ ] I have considered the impact on existing components
